results.title: Sacramento Kings introduce new draft picks Darius Acuff Jr., Alex Karaban, and Emanuel Sharp
results.description: The Sacramento Kings introduced their three new draft picks on Monday, including Darius Acuff Jr., Alex Karaban, and Emanuel Sharp, as the team gears up for the offseason.

results.title: India’s first offshore airport near Kore beach: Key facts you need to know
results.description: India’s first offshore airport is planned near Kore beach in Maharashtra’s Palghar district. The project is expected to serve as the third international airport for the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, with two runways, major cargo capacity and links to key transport projects.

results.title: NSITF seeks stronger government-employers-workers partnership
results.description: THE Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of the Nigeria Social Insurance Trust Fund (NSITF), Mr. Oluwaseun Faleye, has called for stronger collaboration among government, employers and workers to drive enterprise competitiveness, protect workers and achieve inclusive national growth. results.title: South Lanarkshire Council to offer 5.2 per cent increase to private childcare providers if plans get the go-ahead
results.description: The proposed increase follows the Scottish Government’s commitment to raise the Real Living Wage for childcare workers in the private and third sectors to £13.45 per hour from April 2026.

results.title: Political parties, Independent MP write to CJI on SIR, role of ECI

results.title: Elle Season 1 Review: Pretty In Pink, Smarter Than Expected, Elle Finds Its Own Voice
results.description: Elle, the prequel to Legally Blonde, initially borrows so heavily from the original that it risks feeling like an exercise in brand management. Lexi Minetree shoulders an unenviable responsibility and emerges remarkably assured.
